name: Capital One Quicksilver Secured Cash Rewards Credit Card
title: Capital One Quicksilver Secured Cash Rewards Credit Card (Capital One)
text:
Card: Capital One Quicksilver Secured Cash Rewards Credit Card (Capital One)
BEST FOR FREQUENT TRAVELERS WITH A LOW CREDIT SCORE
Pros: This secured card offers straightforward cash back and helps rebuild credit
Cons: This card has a hefty security deposit and APR
Why we chose it: This secured card offers a decent 1.5% return rate on general purchases, making it a solid, simple option for cardholders; it also has no annual fee. However, it starts with an extremely low $200 credit limit. (Partner offer)
Who it's good for: This card is ideal if you’re looking for a low-cost way to boost your credit score while earning cash back with no annual fee.
Annual fee: $0
Rewards: 1.5 - 5% cash-back
APR: N/A,N/A,28.99% (Variable),28.99% (Variable),None,28.99% (Variable)
Review: https://thepointsguy.com/credit-cards/capital-one/capital-one-quicksilver-secured-review/
